name: hhid
description: household id

name: hh_size
description: number of people in the household

name: hh_adult_women
description: number of adult women in the houshold (18 year or older)

name: hh_adult_men
description: number of adult men in the houshold (18 year or older)

name: hh_child_5
description: number of children in the houshold that are younger than 5 years old

name: hh_child_18
description: number of children in the houshold that are younger than 18 years old

name: hh_elders
description: number of elderly household members (>65 years old)

name: hh_elder_women
description: number of elderly women in household (>65 years old)

name: hh_elder_men
description: number of elderly men in household (>65 years old)

name: dependency
description: Ratio of economically dependent members (children, elderly) to working-age members

name: is_head
description: the respondent is identified as the household head (main decision-maker or primary earner)

name: age
description: age of  the respondrent (farmer) or other identified individual

name: sex
description: sex of the respondent (male/female) or other identified individual

name: education
description: education level attained by the respondrent (farmer) or other identified individual

name: civil_status
description: civil status of the respondrent (farmer) or other identified individual

name: religion
description: religion of ther respondrent (farmer) or other identified individual

name: hh_income
description: total household income

name: hh_income_source
description: sources of income

name: farmland
description: amount of farmland managed by the household

name: farmland_owned
description: amount of farmland owned by the household

name: farmland_rentedin
description: amount of farmland rented in by the household

name: farmland_rentedout
description: amount of farmland rented out by the household

name: cropland
description: amount of cropland managed by the household

name: cropland_used
description: amount of cropland used by the household

name: cropland_owned
description: amount of cropland owned by the household

name: cropland_rentedin
description: amount of cropland rentedin by the household

name: cropland_rentedout
description: amount of cropland rentedout by the household

name: grassland
description: amount of grassland managed by the household

name: grassland_owned
description: amount of grassland owned by the household

name: grassland_rentedin
description: amount of grassland rentedin by the household

name: grassland_rentedout
description: amount of grassland rentedout by the household

name: communal_land
description: amount of communal land the household has access to

name: land_irrigated
description: amount of land that can be irrigated

name: land_ownedby
description: who owns the land?

name: land_tenure
description: land tenure type

name: plot_labour
description: Number of days per year spent working on the plot (single crop if there are multiple)

name: farm_labour
description: Number of days per year spent working on the farm

name: plot_labour_hh
description: Number of days per year spent working on the plot (single crop if there are multiple) contributed by household members without explicit wages

name: farm_labour_hh
description: Number of days per year spent working on the farm contributed by household members without explicit wages

name: plot_labour_hired
description: Number of days per year spent working on the plot (single crop if there are multiple) by workers  from outside the household in exchange for cash or in-kind payment

name: farm_labour_hired
description: Number of days per year spent working on the farm by workers  from outside the household in exchange for cash or in-kind payment

name: plot_labour_exchange
description: Number of days per year spent working on the plot (single crop if there are multiple) trough reciprocal labor arrangements between households without monetary payment

name: farm_labour_exchange
description: Number of days per year spent working on the farm trough reciprocal labor arrangements between households without monetary payment

name: offfarm_labour
description: Number of days pe ryear spent working off the farm, for someone else

name: offfarm_selfemployed
description: Number of days per year spent working off the farm, self-employed

name: livestock_labour
description: Number of days per year spent tending livestock

name: cooperative_member
description: is the household member of an agricultural cooperative

name: cooperative_product
description: what is the product purchased by the cooperative

name: housing_quality
description: Physical characteristics of the dwelling, including materials used for walls, roof, and floor

name: electricity
description: Whether the household has access to an electrical power supply

name: water_source
description: Origin of water used by the household for drinking, cooking, and other domestic uses

name: sanitation
description: Facilities and practices for managing human excreta and maintaining hygiene

name: field_id
description: identifier of a particular field within a farm/household

name: field_size
description: size of the particular field

name: field_distance
description: Physical distance from the household dwelling to the plot

name: credit_access
description: does the household have access to credit
